name: credit-card-hacker
description: AI-powered credit card churning. Skills + reference data for picking your next card, hitting min spend, deciding when to cancel/downgrade/keep, hunting elevated and NLL offers, planning bank-bonus runs, and avoiding shutdowns. Try: 'What card should I get next?' or 'Should I keep my Sapphire Reserve another year?'. After install, run /credit-card-hacker:getting-started to build your card profile.
